name: HEAD Performance Visor
description: The HEAD Performance Visor keeps the sun out of your eyes without trapping heat. Features a moisture-absorbing terrycloth sweatband, adjustable hook-and-loop closure for a custom fit, and a pre-curved brim that won't interfere with your serve motion.
care_instructions: Hand wash with mild detergent and air dry. The terrycloth sweatband can be spot-cleaned between washes. Do not machine wash or the brim may lose its shape.
